scored_items.title: Jet.AI unveils $10 per share payout in proposed $300M reverse takeover; shares surge
*Jet.AI Hldrs Would Have Ownership in Spin-Off Co That Holds Co's Current Data Center Joint Venture and Its Beneficial Ownership Interest in AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp >JTAI
*Jet.AI Hldrs Would Have Ownership in Reverse Takeover Entity, Representing About $10/Shr of Additional Stk and Cash Value >JTAI

*Jet.AI: As a Condition of Transaction, Co Would Spin off Its Data Center Joint Venture, Beneficial Ownership Interest in AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp Into a Newly Formed, Independent Public Co >JTAI
*Jet.AI Entered Into a Non-Binding LOI to Effect Reverse Takeover Transaction With Privately Held Operating Co Valuing Counterparty at About $300M >JTAI
Jet.AI Enters $300M Reverse Merger To Receive Stakes In Two Publicly Traded Companies Representing ~$10 Per Share In Additional Cash And Stock Value
*Jet.AI Hldrs to Receive $10 Per Shr in Stk and Cash as Co Signs Letter of Intent for a New $300 M Reverse Takeover >JTAI
